conformance_levels.label: interpretive-governance:informative
conformance_levels.description: Conceptual alignment with interpretive governance principles without structural enforcement.

conformance_levels.label: interpretive-governance:structural
conformance_levels.description: Structural enforcement of interpretive constraints and explicit uncertainty handling.

conformance_levels.label: interpretive-governance:full
conformance_levels.description: Complete enforcement of interpretive and agentic governance rules with auditable traceability.

maturity_statuses.description: Under active definition. Shape and wording may change.
Coherent enough for early implementation and review; not yet stabilized.
Instrumentation or measurement shape intended for trials; no behavioral proof implied.
Stabilized after implementation feedback and validation.
Retained for compatibility but no longer recommended for new deployments.

extension_conformance_note: Extensions may declare their own artifact-level requirements. Extension conformance does not imply behavioral measurement unless an evidence record is published.
